## LibraryData.resolveBuiltInSpec() function

Resolves a FullLibraryLoadSpec for built-in loading to individual sub-library specs.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function resolveBuiltInSpec<TCollectionId extends string = string>(spec: FullLibraryLoadSpec | undefined, subLibraryId: SubLibraryId): LibraryLoadSpec<TCollectionId>;
```

</td></tr>
<tr><td>

subLibraryId

[SubLibraryId](./ts-chocolate.librarydata.sublibraryid.md)


</td><td>

[LibraryLoadSpec](./ts-chocolate.librarydata.libraryloadspec.md)<!-- -->&lt;TCollectionId&gt;

The resolved LibraryLoadSpec, or false if not specified
